content.en:
"This is the Xuanyu Pavilion, you are not allowed to enter!"

A Dao Ancestor of Xuanyu Pavilion appeared and stopped Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian took out the membership order of the Xuanyu Pavilion: "I want to join the Xuanyu Pavilion!"

"Hey, member order!"

The other party was a little surprised.

Membership orders can be very precious, and they need to spend a lot of points to purchase, while the membership orders of the Xuanyu Pavilion are purchased by the members of the Xuanyu Pavilion themselves, and then introduce their close relatives or friends to join the Xuanyu Pavilion.

Basically, after purchasing a membership order, it is quickly used up, and it is difficult to circulate it.

"Which Dao Ancestor introduced you to?"

The other party asked curiously.

However, Ye Tian would not confess his apprenticeship, otherwise it would not be good if he attracted the attention of the great enemy.

So, Ye Tiandao: "Accidental!"

"Alright, then come in!"

This Dao Ancestor didn't ask too much, after all, it had nothing to do with him, whoever obtained the membership order could join the Xuanyu Pavilion, this was the rule.

After all, the Xuanyu Pavilion was just a loose force, and there were not so many requirements.

Soon, Ye Tian went through the formalities of joining the Xuanyu Pavilion.

At this time, a half-step sevenfold ancestor named Jin He Dao Ancestor passed a piece of information to Ye Tian, which contained a lot of information about the Xuanyu Pavilion, which could make Ye Tian familiar with the Xuanyu Pavilion faster.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, after joining the Xuanyu Pavilion, there is usually nothing to do, and if you want to exchange the resources of the Xuanyu Pavilion, you need points. As for how to get points, they are all above. "

Jin He Daozu didn't say much, and left.

And Ye Tian browsed through this information, and he had a general understanding of Xuanyu Pavilion.

Points are required for any transaction in the Jade Pavilion, and there are many ways to obtain them, such as exchanging points for your own treasures, or taking on quests.

These quests are posted by other members, some are quests to find treasures, and some are bounty quests, such as killing a certain Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian also saw the task of rewarding a sevenfold peak ancestor in the mission system of the Xuanyu Pavilion.

However, such a task is difficult, and he doesn't think about it.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian lived in the Xuanyu Pavilion.

He exchanged some of the treasures on his body that were not of much help to him to the Xuanyu Pavilion, and then purchased some resource treasures that were beneficial to him.

In this way, Ye Tian's cultivation slowly improved, but without the resources to quickly assist Yuan Dao to refine his body, he could not quickly improve his cultivation.

Therefore, he is also looking for news.

There are many treasures that can help the half-step sevenfold ancestor refine his body, but the price of each one is very expensive.

Ye Tiancai came here, and his net worth was not as good as those rich Dao Ancestors.

As a result, he was not able to buy that resource in large quantities.

And he, who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, has too strong a foundation and needs more resources, so he must find a way to collect resources.

And on this day, Ye Tian found out that an ancient nest nearby had a lot of treasures that could refine the body.

Strictly speaking, it is a treasure obtained from a primordial artifact, similar to the Dark Bluestone Liquid.

This kind of primordial artifact is called primordial vine grass, these primordial vine grass is very sharp, can cut through the half-step sevenfold original ancestor's Dao body, and the attack power is very powerful.

If you kill the Primordial Vine Grass, you can harvest the Primordial Vine Liquid in its body, and the effect of this Primordial Vine Liquid is ten times better than the Dark Bluestone Liquid.

However, as soon as the primordial vine grass appeared, there were basically a bunch of primordial vine grasses, and there might be primordial vine grasses comparable to the sevenfold ancestor level.

Therefore, the half-step sevenfold ancestor did not dare to provoke the primordial vine grass.

The Sevenfold Origin Ancestor was naturally not afraid of the Primordial Vine Grass, but the ancient nest where the Primordial Vine Grass was located suppressed the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor extremely hugely, and when the Sevenfold Ancestor entered that ancient nest, his strength would be suppressed to a rather dangerous level.

Furthermore, the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor didn't need the Primordial Vine Liquid, so naturally he wouldn't venture into the Ancient Nest where the Primordial Vine Grass was located.

"Xuanyu Pavilion also has Dao Ancestors who sell primordial rattan liquid, but the price is too expensive, I can't buy much, it's more convenient to go to that ancient nest to hunt primordial vine grass by myself. "

But Ye Tian also knew very well that if he went to that ancient nest, there would be a certain danger, and maybe he would fall.

"We have to copy one more copy body, and there will be one less copy body over there in the primeval realm!"

Ye Tian immediately began to copy.

Soon, a replica body was copied.

Then, Ye Tian's replica body went to the ancient nest where the primordial vine grass was.

This ancient nest is called the ancient nest of vine grass, and in fact, it is not only a primitive antiquity of primordial vine grass, but also a primordial antiquity of grass.

It's just that rattan grass is the most powerful, hence its name.

......

Vine grass nest.

At this time, Dao Ancestors continued to enter from here, and Dao Ancestors came out from here.

Suddenly, a figure appeared here, and it was Ye Tian who had just rushed over.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly escaped into the vine grass ancient nest.

Entering the vine grass ancient nest, Ye Tian appeared on the periphery, there were no primordial antiquities here, most of the primordial antiquities were in the inner perimeter, and it was very dangerous there.

However, Ye Tian didn't explore for long before he encountered an original antiquity.

But this primordial artifact is not a primordial vine grass, but a red grass.

"Flame Ancient Grass!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

After all, he was coming here, so he naturally understood the situation here in advance, and naturally he also knew something about the Flame Ancient Grass.

But.

The Flame Ancient Grass was very weak, even the weaker Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor could deal with them, and only a very small number of Flame Ancient Grass could match the top-of-the-line Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor.

As for the Flame Ancient Grass that was comparable to the Sevenfold Ancestor, there was not one, at least not found now.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian directly shattered the Flame Ancient Grass with one blow, and left directly without any gain.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to go deeper, and finally found the primordial vine grass, but it was not one, but thirty-eight primordial vine grasses, all of which were gathered together, and the deterrent effect was very great.

After Ye Tian sensed the breath of the primordial vine grass, he quickly frowned.

"I can't deal with it, there are a few primordial vine grasses among them, I'm afraid they are comparable to the top half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors, I may not be able to beat them!"

Ye Tian was not reckless, and retreated directly.

Although he had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, there were still quite a few Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai District Realm who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, so it was not unusual.

He had just broken through to the half-step sevenfold ancestor realm, so he was far from being invincible in this realm, and any top half-step sevenfold ancestor could beat him.

If those Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao and broken the boundaries dozens of times came, they could kill him in an instant with one blow.

Therefore, he is not qualified to be arrogant now, and he must keep a low profile.
